metadata.description: Read-only Q&A pairs verifiable against evaluations/fixtures/*.json
metadata.policy: OD-5: typed tools only — run_script is not available in production agent

qa_pair.question: Using list_calendar_events from 2026-06-20T00:00:00Z to 2026-06-21T00:00:00Z on the eval fixture calendar, what is the title of the event starting at 14:00 UTC?
How many calendar events does the eval fixture have on 2026-06-20 UTC (between midnight and midnight)?
What is the summary of the eval fixture event with id evt-lunch?
On the eval fixture inbox, which lane is thread thread-schedule-001 classified in?
What is the subject of thread thread-reply-002 in the eval fixture search results?
Who is the sender of thread thread-fyi-003 in the eval fixture?
Which Corsair MCP discovery tools are allowed in the Command Inbox agent allowlist?
Is run_script available to the production inbox agent per OD-5?
Name three typed write tools that require user approval before execution.
Is get_thread_summary a read-only agent tool?
